context: Solo AI builders deciding whether to implement a product idea
problem: Generic product directions consume build time
mechanism: A structured evidence gate challenges demand and differentiation
outcome: Weak directions are stopped before implementation
failure_boundary: Adds little value when an experiment is cheap and reversible
evidence_quotes: Weak directions were stopped before implementation.

problem: Generic advice does not change product decisions
outcome: Users do not return after the first report
failure_boundary: Monitoring dashboards remain valid when monitoring is the primary job
